upload.title: Upload file
upload.dragDropText: Drag & drop or click to choose a file
upload.errorSelectFile: Please select a file to upload
upload.expirationLegendFile: The encrypted file will be deleted automatically after
upload.fileTooLarge: File exceeds the maximum allowed size of {{maxSize}}

display.captionDecryptionKey: Do not refresh this window as secret might be restricted to one time download.
display.inputDecryptionKeyLabel: A decryption key is required, please enter it below
display.secureMessageSubtitle: You've received a secure message that can only be viewed once
display.oneTimeWarning: This message will self-destruct after viewing. Once revealed, it cannot be accessed again.
display.oneTimeWarningReady: Make sure you're ready to view it now.
display.authRequiredDescription: This secret can only be viewed by authenticated users. Please sign in to continue.

error.title: Secret does not exist
error.subtitle: It might be caused by any of these reasons.
error.subtitleOpenedBefore: A secret can be restricted to a single download. It might be lost because the sender clicked this link before you viewed it.
error.subtitleOpenedCompromised: The secret might have been compromised and read by someone else. You should contact the sender and request a new secret.
error.subtitleBrokenLink: The link must match perfectly in order for the decryption to work, it might be missing some magic digits.
error.subtitleExpired: No secret lasts forever. All stored secrets will expire and self destruct automatically. Lifetime varies from one hour up to one week.

result.title: Secret stored securely
result.subtitle: Your secret has been encrypted and stored. Share these links to provide access.
result.subtitleDownloadOnce: Secret can only be downloaded once. So do not open the link yourself. The cautious should send the decryption key in a separate communication channel.
result.rowOneClickDescription: Share this link for direct access to the secret
result.rowShortLinkDescription: Requires the decryption key to be shared separately
result.rowDecryptionKeyDescription: Required to decrypt the message with the short link

secret.subtitleFile: Your file has been decrypted and downloaded. If you need to download it again, click the button below.
secret.subtitleMessage: This secret will not be accessible again. Make sure to save it now!

delete.messageDeleted: The secret is removed from the server!
delete.dialogMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this secret?

features.title: Share secrets securely with ease
features.subtitle: Yopass is created to reduce the amount of clear text passwords stored in email and chat conversations by encrypting and generating a short lived link which can only be viewed once.
features.featureEndToEndText: Encryption and decryption are being made locally in the browser. The key is never stored with yopass.
features.featureSelfDestructionText: Encrypted messages have a fixed lifetime and will be deleted automatically after expiration.
features.featureOneTimeText: The encrypted message can only be downloaded once which reduces the risk of someone peeking at your secrets.
features.featureSimpleSharingText: Yopass generates a unique one click link for the encrypted file or message. The decryption password can alternatively be sent separately.
features.featureNoAccountsText: Sharing should be quick and easy; No additional information except the encrypted secret is stored in the database.
features.featureOpenSourceText: Yopass encryption mechanism are built on open source software meaning full transparency with the possibility to audit and submit features.

readOnly.title: Secret Retrieval
readOnly.description: This instance is configured for secret retrieval only. To view a secret, you need a complete secret link.

auth.loginRequiredDescription: You must be signed in to create secrets on this server.

request.createSubtitle: Create a secure link that lets someone send a secret to you. The reply is encrypted in their browser with a key that only this browser can unlock.
request.errorCreateFailed: Could not create the secret request. Please try again.
request.resultSubtitle: Share this link with the person who should provide the secret.
request.resultLinkDescription: Anyone with this link can submit one secret to you. The link includes a key fingerprint so the recipient's browser can verify the encryption key.
request.resultKeyNotice: The private key for this request is stored in this browser only. To collect the secret from another browser, export the request from the list first.
request.listSubtitle: Requests created in this browser. Secrets are decrypted locally with the private key stored here.
request.listEmpty: No secret requests yet. Create one to receive a secret securely.
request.importDescription: Paste a request export from another browser to manage it here, including its private key.
request.importError: That doesn't look like a valid request export.
request.errorFetchFailed: Could not fetch the secret from the server.
request.errorDecryptFailed: Could not decrypt the secret. The private key in this browser may not match this request.
request.errorRotateFailed: Could not replace the key pair.
request.errorSubmitFailed: Could not submit the secret. Please try again.
request.revealNotice: The secret has been deleted from the server. This is the only time it will be shown — copy it somewhere safe now.

confirm.revokeMessage: The link will stop working immediately and any secret already provided will be deleted from the server. This cannot be undone.
confirm.rotateMessage: A new key pair will be generated in this browser and the public key on the server will be replaced. Links you shared earlier will fail their key verification — share the new link afterwards.
confirm.removeMessage: This only removes the request and its private key from this browser. If the request is still active on the server, revoke it instead.
confirm.clearCollectedMessage: All collected requests and their private keys are removed from this browser. The secrets were already deleted from the server when you viewed them.
confirm.purgeAllMessage: Every active request is revoked on the server — their links stop working and any secrets already provided are deleted. All private keys and tokens are then wiped from this browser. This cannot be undone.

request.provideSubtitle: Enter the secret below. It is encrypted in your browser before it is sent — only the requester can read it.
request.provideEncryptionNotice: End-to-end encrypted: the secret is encrypted with the requester's public key before leaving your browser. The server never sees it in plain text.
request.provideInputPlaceholder: Enter the secret to send back...
request.provideSuccessSubtitle: The secret was encrypted and delivered. You can close this page.
request.provideFulfilledSubtitle: A secret has already been submitted for this request.
request.provideNotFoundSubtitle: This secret request has expired, been revoked, or never existed.
request.provideIntegritySubtitle: The encryption key on the server does not match the fingerprint in your link. Do not submit the secret — contact the requester.
request.errorPurgeFailed: Some requests could not be revoked on the server. They were kept in the list so you can retry.
